commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a07d9e0af4422a8b7651ddc40ad68d3172adfa5b)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `crabbox pause` and `crabbox resume`, a new optional `PausableBackend`, Islo pause/resume SDK calls, tests, and command/provider docs.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection of the proposed commit shows `App.printHelp()` still lists stop then cleanup while the PR only adds pause/resume to Kong and docs. The pause/resume feature itself is supported by copied live output in the PR body rather than a local reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is the right lane because the remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of a new provider capability/API, not a code-only repair.

target.title: feat: pause/resume commands via optional PausableBackend (islo first)
target.body:
## What

Adds a generic, opt-in **pause/resume** capability to crabbox and implements it for the **islo** provider, which natively supports snapshot-to-disk pause + resume.

## Design (right altitude, not a one-off)

Mirrors crabbox's existing optional-interface pattern (`DoctorBackend`, `CleanupBackend`):

- **`PausableBackend`** interface (`Backend` + `Pause`/`Resume`) plus `PauseRequest`/`ResumeRequest` in `internal/cli/provider_backend.go`.
- **`crabbox pause` / `crabbox resume`** commands that reuse `stop`'s flag parsing and provider resolution, then dispatch via a type assertion. Providers that don't implement the interface return a clear `provider=<name> does not support pause` — no behavior change for anyone else.
- A compile-time assertion (`var _ core.PausableBackend = (*isloBackend)(nil)`) guards signature drift.

## islo implementation

`Pause`/`Resume` call the Islo SDK's `PauseSandbox`/`ResumeSandbox` (which return a decoded `SandboxResponse`), resolve the lease like `stop`, and **keep the lease claim across a pause** so it can be resumed.

## Tests

`TestIsloPauseResumeCallProvider` (backend dispatches to the provider with the resolved sandbox name; non-Crabbox ids rejected). `go build ./...`, `go vet`, `gofmt`, and the full `internal/cli` + `internal/providers/islo` suites pass.

## Verified live (api.islo.dev)

```
warmup → status: state=running ready=true
pause  → paused lease=…        → status: state=paused  ready=false
resume → resumed lease=…       → status: state=running ready=true
```

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: zozo123
